evidence_requirements.description: Recent high-severity or confirmed-outage incidents from IcM. Returns IncidentId, Severity, IsOutage, Title, Status, CreateDate, ImpactStartDate, ChildCount, OwningTenantName, SupportTicketId. Filters: Severity <= 2 or IsOutage == true, configured lookback window and owning tenant names.
Root-cause level outage data for a specific incident. Provides detailed root cause analysis including impacted services and timeline.

SLI breach data for a specific customer and service. Returns per-subscription/region/SLI aggregates: CustomerName, SubscriptionId, Region, SLO_SliId, ImpactedResources, TotalImpactDurationMin, EarliestImpactStart, LatestImpactEnd, AvgValueAcrossWindows, MinValueAcrossWindows.

SLI breach data across all customers for a service (multi-customer view). Returns per-region/SLI aggregates: Region, SLO_SliId, ImpactedResources, ImpactedSubscriptions, TotalImpactDurationMin, EarliestImpactStart, LatestImpactEnd, AvgValueAcrossWindows, MinValueAcrossWindows. Used to detect cross-customer platform-wide impact.

Support cases filed by a customer. Returns: CaseNumber, Title, State, IsCritSit, SupportProductName, ResourceUri, CreatedDateTime, IsEscalated, InitialSeverity, Severity, AzureSubscriptionId, Customer_CloudCustomerName. Filters to the configured lookback window for configured support products.

Cross-customer support request analysis to determine if other customers are also filing tickets for the same service/product. Calls collect_support_request_tool without a customer_name to return all recent support cases across all customers.

Workload and throughput metrics to detect traffic spikes. Uses the SLI impacted resource data to identify abnormal load patterns — high ImpactedResources with short TotalImpactDurationMin suggests a spike rather than sustained degradation.
evidence_requirements.note: Load analysis is derived from SLI breach patterns. Agent compares ImpactedResources, TotalImpactDurationMin, and AvgValueAcrossWindows to distinguish spikes from sustained failures.

evidence_requirements.description: Cross-customer baseline comparison to determine if the current load pattern is abnormal. Compares the customer-specific SLI data (ER-SLI-001) against the multi-customer aggregate (ER-SLI-002) — if the customer's degradation is worse than the platform average, it suggests a customer-specific workload issue.
evidence_requirements.note: Baseline comparison: agent compares ER-SLI-001 (customer) AvgValueAcrossWindows against ER-SLI-002 (all customers) to detect customer-specific anomalies vs platform-wide issues.

evidence_requirements.description: Dependency service SLI breach data. For each dependency service configured in dependency_services.json, calls collect_impacted_resource_multicustomer_tool with the dependency's service_tree_id to detect SLI degradation in customer regions. Returns per-region/SLI aggregates enriched with DependencyServiceName.
evidence_requirements.note: Called once per dependency service. Results are filtered to customer regions (from ER-REGION-001) before symptom evaluation.

evidence_requirements.description: Distinct regions where the customer has monitored resources for their primary service. Used to scope dependency service scanning to only regions that matter for the customer.
